title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, December 17 2024
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 18/12/2024
Image reference: 2024-12-18_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-december-17-2024_img1.png
Bulkers: Bulker values remain stable this week. Capesize BC Zampa Blue (178,500 DWT, May 2011, Mitsui Ichihara) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 30 mil, VV Value USD 30.02 mil
Post Panamax BC Century Wave (91,700 DWT, Jul 2013, Oshima) sold to Dongguan Haichang buyers for USD 22 mil, VV Value USD 21.66 mil
Supramax BC Porthos (56,800 DWT, Jan 2010, Jiangsu Hantong Ship Heavy Industry) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 13 mil, VV Value USD 12.06 mil
Handy BC Oak Harbour (33,700 DWT, Feb 2005, Oshima) sold SS/DD due to undisclosed buyers for 9 mil, VV Value USD 8.79 mil
Tankers: Values softening slightly across the board last week with midage tonnage having the greatest decrease. VLCC DHT Scandinavia (317,800 DWT, Nov 2006, Hyundai Samho Heavy Ind) sold to unknown Chinese buyers for USD 43.4 mil, VV Value USD 41.66 mil
Containers: Values remain fairly stable this week, the increases for older vessels slow slightly compared with last week
Feedermax Vega Vela (1,118 TEU, Jinling, 2005) sold to undisclosed for USD 7.5 mil, VV Value USD 7.2 mil
Image
